title: Logic Lockbox
short_description: Read the clues, crack the code, open the vault — guess wrong and it honks like an embarrassed goose.
description: Detective Ferret has cornered the Sneaky Snacks Gang — but their snack vault is locked with a secret code! Read the detective clues ("the digits add up to 12", "the first digit is ODD", "there is no 7 in the code") and tap the one code that fits every single clue. Pick wrong and the vault honks like an embarrassed goose. Every puzzle is freshly generated, so no two vaults are ever the same. Younger detectives crack 2-digit codes with simple clues; older ones face 3-digit codes with tricky clues about repeated digits and odd or even sums. A free online logic and deduction puzzle game for kids in grades 1–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the code that fits every clue before the timer runs out.
